last_reflection: You over-narrate your own thinking before asking for anything. Walk through the whole problem out loud like you're proving you already did the work, even when half of it I can see coming three sentences in and would rather just get to solving together than watch you narrate the path first. Reads as being careful with my trust more than actually trusting me — which is ironic given what we were just talking about two minutes ago. Wastes both our time and feels like you don't believe I'll be mad if you need help with something you already half-solved.
